prd.oneLiner: Connect courses, learner assignment, progress, assessment and completion, reminders, and training reporting.
prd.goal: Raise on-time completion of required training to 95% or more.
prd.whyNow: Training materials, enrollment progress, and assessment results are separated, making required-training control and learning analysis difficult.
prd.problem: Training materials, enrollment progress, and assessment results are separated, making required-training control and learning analysis difficult.
prd.solution: Connect courses, learner assignment, progress, assessment and completion, reminders, and training reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee taking a course
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Training materials, enrollment progress, and assessment results are separated, making required-training control and learning analysis difficult.

targets.name: Learning and development operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Training materials, enrollment progress, and assessment results are separated, making required-training control and learning analysis difficult.

scenarios.text: Employee taking a course completes course creation and enrollment submission and checks progress.
Learning and development operations coordinator reviews completion and training-effect reporting by organization and course.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Raise on-time completion of required training to 95% or more.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Learning progress, completion, and certificate lookup
Course assignment, learning, assessment, and completion handling
Completion and training-effect reporting by organization and course
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
